Description: Simultaneously applies tape and joint compound to all drywall joints. Features EasyClean cover plate (quarter-turn removal), stainless steel side plates, hard anodized push rod/cable drum, adjustable brake, enclosed rollers, and integrated tool hook.

World's lightest automatic taper at 5.65 lbs — up to 20% lighter than competitors. Carbon fiber main tube and control tube are dent-proof and temperature-neutral. Includes EasyClean cover plate, adjustable brake, and tool-less tube protector.

Automatically dispenses and feathers joint compound on butt and flat joints in one pass. Features adjustable crown dial, pivoting axle, and EasyRoll wheel system for finishing outside corner bead up to 2x faster than by hand.

Automatically dispenses and feathers joint compound on butt and flat joints in one pass. Features adjustable crown dial, pivoting axle, and EasyRoll wheel system for finishing outside corner bead up to 2x faster than by hand.

Automatically dispenses and feathers joint compound on butt and flat joints in one pass. Features adjustable crown dial, pivoting axle, and EasyRoll wheel system for finishing outside corner bead up to 2x faster than by hand.

Interchangeable fixed-length fiberglass handle. Base handle fits corner roller, corner applicator, and nail spotter without adapters. D-shaped fitting prevents rotation during use. Part of TapeTech's one-handle-for-every-tool system.

Interchangeable aluminum extension support handle. Base handle fits corner roller, corner applicator, and nail spotter without adapters. D-shaped fitting prevents rotation during use. Part of TapeTech's one-handle-for-every-tool system.

Extends from 41 to 63 inches for greater reach with all TapeTech EasyClean, EasyClean High Capacity, and Power Assist Finishing Boxes. Industry's strongest extendable finishing box handle. Anodized aluminum construction.

Supplies joint compound to corner finishers for fast internal corner finishing. Also used with mud heads for paper-faced corner bead installation. Features stainless steel cone. Fits FHTT fiberglass or XHTT extension handle.

Supplies joint compound to corner finishers for fast internal corner finishing. Also used with mud heads for paper-faced corner bead installation. Features stainless steel cone. Fits FHTT fiberglass or XHTT extension handle.

Feathers joint compound on both sides of internal corners in one pass. Spring-loaded for imperfect corners. Stainless steel frames and patented positive ball retainer. Use with CA07TT/CA08TT or 14TT MudRunner.

Wipes down and feathers both sides of an internal corner in one pass. Spring action compensates for corners over or under 90 degrees. Designed to follow the Corner Roller to smooth excess compound after tape embedding.

Feathers both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. Adjustable spring pressure via tension spring engagement/disengagement. EasyRoll wheels for smoothest wall action. Stainless steel frames and positive ball retainer.

Feathers both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. Adjustable spring pressure via tension spring engagement/disengagement. EasyRoll wheels for smoothest wall action. Stainless steel frames and positive ball retainer.

Fills depressions left by nail/screw heads in drywall while removing excess compound simultaneously. EasyClean design. Hardened steel skid plate protects stainless steel blade from proud fasteners and extends blade life over wheel designs.

Fills depressions left by nail/screw heads in drywall while removing excess compound simultaneously. EasyClean design. Hardened steel skid plate protects stainless steel blade from proud fasteners and extends blade life over wheel designs.

Delivers joint compound to internal and external corners with precision. Twist-of-the-wrist piston activation creates consistent compound flow; twist back to stop instantly. Holds 50% more compound than an 8-inch and 70% more than a 7-inch corner applicator. Works with corner finishers and mud heads.

Fills automatic tapers (via 85T gooseneck) and filling boxes/MudRunner/corner applicators/nail spotters (via 90T filler adapter). Features Twist-lock foot valve, integrated O-Ring seal, and redesigned head. Slim tube preferred by professional finishers.
Used with 72TT, 73TT, or 76TT loading pump to fill the automatic taper. Heavy-duty durable design. Features integrated foot for stability. Efficiently fills TapeTech automatic tapers.
Attaches to 72TT or 76TT EasyClean Pumps to fill corner applicators, nail spotters, EasyClean, EasyClean High Capacity, and Power Assist Finishing Boxes with joint compound.

Dual-purpose direct and indirect corner flusher. Applies joint compound to or smooths compound already in internal corners. Fits all TapeTech corner tools including compound tubes, 88TTF and HF handles, 35TT and 50TT corner applicators, and 14TT MudRunner.

Dual-purpose direct and indirect corner flusher. Applies joint compound to or smooths compound already in internal corners. Fits all TapeTech corner tools including compound tubes, 88TTF and HF handles, 35TT and 50TT corner applicators, and 14TT MudRunner.

Dual-purpose direct and indirect corner flusher. Applies joint compound to or smooths compound already in internal corners. Fits all TapeTech corner tools including compound tubes, 88TTF and HF handles, 35TT and 50TT corner applicators, and 14TT MudRunner.

Dual-purpose direct and indirect corner flusher. Applies joint compound to or smooths compound already in internal corners. Fits all TapeTech corner tools including compound tubes, 88TTF and HF handles, 35TT and 50TT corner applicators, and 14TT MudRunner.

Flagship carbon fiber automatic taper — the first carbon fiber taper on the market (introduced 2018). Significantly lighter, dent-proof, and temperature-neutral. Simultaneously applies tape and joint compound to all drywall joints.

Standard aluminum automatic taper that simultaneously applies tape and joint compound to all drywall flat and corner joints. Handmade from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components; machined in Canada.
Compact automatic taper designed for low-clearance and tight-space applications where a full-length taper cannot be used. Applies tape and compound simultaneously.

Semi-automatic tape-and-compound applicator designed to bridge the gap between hand tools and fully automatic tapers. Ideal for general contractors and users entering the world of automatic taping tools.

Specialty 5.5-inch flat finishing box for tight and narrow joints. Handmade from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components, machined in Canada. Features manual sweeping grip and bead wheel for corner bead work.
7-inch flat finishing box. Dispenses and feathers joint compound on flat joints in one pass. Handmade from U.S. billet aluminum and steel. Features manual sweeping grip and bead wheel.
8-inch flat finishing box. Dispenses and feathers joint compound on flat joints in one pass. Handmade from U.S. billet aluminum and steel. Features manual sweeping grip and bead wheel.

10-inch flat finishing box — one of the most popular sizes. Dispenses and feathers joint compound in one pass. Handmade U.S. billet aluminum and steel; machined in Canada. Manual sweeping grip and bead wheel.

12-inch flat finishing box for wide flat joint finishing. Dispenses and feathers compound in one pass. Handmade U.S. billet aluminum and steel; machined in Canada. Manual sweeping grip and bead wheel.
14-inch flat finishing box — Columbia's widest flat box. Premium finishing for extra-wide joints. Handmade U.S. billet aluminum and steel; machined in Canada. Manual sweeping grip and bead wheel.

High-capacity 8-inch finishing box. Largest compound reservoir on the market for less frequent refilling. Bead wheel protects axle when running on corner bead. Handmade U.S. billet aluminum and steel.

High-capacity 10-inch finishing box. Largest compound reservoir on the market for less frequent refilling. Bead wheel protects axle when running on corner bead. Handmade U.S. billet aluminum and steel.

High-capacity 12-inch finishing box. Largest compound reservoir on the market for less frequent refilling. Bead wheel protects axle when running on corner bead. Handmade U.S. billet aluminum and steel.
Automatic finishing boxes that allow compound delivery without stopping to manually refill. Designed for high-production environments.

2-inch angle head (corner finisher) that feathers compound on both sides of an internal corner in one pass. Spring-loaded for slightly out-of-square corners. Attaches to 7/8" Throttle Box or Throttle Tube."

2.5-inch angle head (corner finisher) that feathers compound on both sides of an internal corner in one pass. Spring-loaded for slightly out-of-square corners. Attaches to 7/8" Throttle Box or Throttle Tube."

3-inch angle head (corner finisher) that feathers compound on both sides of an internal corner in one pass. Spring-loaded for slightly out-of-square corners. Attaches to 7/8" Throttle Box or Throttle Tube."

3.5-inch angle head (corner finisher) that feathers compound on both sides of an internal corner in one pass. Spring-loaded for slightly out-of-square corners. Attaches to 7/8" Throttle Box or Throttle Tube."
Fills nail and screw dimples in drywall while removing excess compound in one stroke. Compatible with Columbia One Handle system. Precision-machined in Canada from U.S. billet aluminum.
Fills nail and screw dimples in drywall while removing excess compound in one stroke. Compatible with Columbia One Handle system. Precision-machined in Canada from U.S. billet aluminum.
Premium inside corner roller designed for embedding tape into internal corners with speed and precision. Advanced design provides superior control for high-production corner work.
Embeds tape into internal (inside) drywall corners. Used with an applicator or throttle box to quickly seat tape into compound-loaded corners.
Embeds and presses paper-faced corner bead compound into standard 90° outside corners. Compatible with Columbia One Handle.
Specialized roller for embedding and finishing bullnose (rounded) outside corner bead. Compatible with Columbia One Handle.
Wide-profile roller for embedding and finishing wide-flange outside corner bead profiles. Compatible with Columbia One Handle.
Slim-profile roller designed for European-style and micro-bead outside corner profiles. Compatible with Columbia One Handle.

Columbia's primary corner applicator/box. Delivers joint compound to angle heads for internal corner finishing. Throttle design provides precision control over compound flow. Compatible with Columbia One Handle.
7-inch corner applicator/box delivering joint compound to angle heads for internal corner finishing. Throttle flow control. Compatible with Columbia One Handle.
New-release compound tube with integrated throttle control. Delivers compound to angle heads and corner tools. Provides more precise flow control than standard compound tubes.
Indirect corner flusher that smooths pre-applied joint compound in internal corners. Multiple blade widths available. Compatible with Columbia One Handle and standard corner tools.
Direct-application corner flusher that both applies and smooths compound in internal corners in one pass. Compatible with all Columbia corner tool handles.
Combination direct and indirect corner flusher. Offers the versatility to apply compound and smooth it within the same tool. Compatible with Columbia corner tool handle system.
Fully machined billet aluminum sander head featuring No Flip Technology for smooth wall tracking. Uses standard paint-pole thread for universal handle compatibility. Machined in Canada.
Advanced drywall sanding tool designed for dust-controlled or wet sanding applications. Lightweight and ergonomic design for large-area sanding efficiency.
Applies joint compound to external (outside) corners for paper-faced corner bead installation. Works with Columbia One Handle system.
Applies joint compound inside corners for tape embedding. Works with Columbia One Handle system and semi-automatic taper setup.
Applies compound in both directions of an internal corner simultaneously. Increases speed and consistency of compound application for internal corners.
Applies joint compound to flat drywall joints in preparation for tape embedding. Used with semi-automatic taper setups and hand-taping workflows.

Universal 4-foot fixed-length aluminum handle compatible with nail spotters, angle heads, rollers, corner boxes, and (with Tomalock adaptor) flat boxes. Handmade from U.S. billet aluminum; hard anodized tube with comfort grips.
Universal 18-inch fixed-length aluminum handle for close-quarters work. Compatible with nail spotters, angle heads, rollers, and corner boxes. Handmade from U.S. billet aluminum.
Universal extendable handle (3 to 5 feet) compatible with the full Columbia tool ecosystem. Hard anodized tube with comfort grips. Described as thickest, strongest, and lightest handle on the market.
Short-range extendable flat box handle (29-39 inches) for standard-height finishing work. Designed specifically for use with Columbia flat finishing boxes.
Standard extendable flat box handle (40-60 inches) for most ceiling and wall flat joint finishing. Designed for Columbia flat boxes.
Long-reach extendable flat box handle (56-76 inches) for high ceilings and vaulted spaces. Designed for Columbia flat boxes.
Extra-long extendable handle for reaching high walls and ceilings with corner tools and angle heads. Compatible with Columbia One Handle system tools.
Compact flat box handle designed for finishing in tight spaces, closets, and confined areas where standard handles cannot maneuver. Works with Columbia flat finishing boxes.
Flat box handle with twist-lock mechanism for secure attachment and quick-release capability. Designed for Columbia finishing boxes.
Standard flat box handle for use with Columbia flat finishing boxes and fat boy boxes. Provides sweeping control for feathering box edges off joints.
Specialized flat box handle with extended reach for difficult-to-access joints. Compatible with Columbia flat and fat boy finishing boxes.
Carbon fiber compound tube — 18% lighter than aluminum equivalent. Dent-proof, temperature-neutral. Part of Columbia's Predator carbon fiber tool family introduced to reduce finisher fatigue.
Carbon fiber cam-lock tube — 23% lighter than aluminum equivalent. Secure cam-lock mechanism for quick attachment/removal. Dent-proof and temperature-stable.
Carbon fiber hot mud pump — 10% lighter than standard aluminum version. Designed for use with fast-setting compounds. Part of the Predator carbon fiber family.
Carbon fiber extendable Columbia One Handle — 14% lighter than aluminum. Dent-proof, temperature-neutral, and warm to the touch in cold weather. Compatible with full Columbia tool ecosystem.
Carbon fiber fixed-length Columbia One Handle — 35% lighter than aluminum equivalent. Dent-proof and temperature-stable. Compatible with full Columbia tool ecosystem.
Carbon fiber XL-length handle (4 to 8 feet) — 11% lighter than aluminum. For high-ceiling work with Columbia tools. Dent-proof and temperature-neutral.
Carbon fiber short matrix flat box handle — 6% lighter than aluminum. Designed for standard-height flat joint finishing with Columbia flat boxes.
Carbon fiber standard matrix flat box handle — 8% lighter than aluminum. Designed for most ceiling and wall applications with Columbia flat boxes.
Carbon fiber long matrix flat box handle — 11% lighter than aluminum. Designed for high-ceiling and vaulted-space finishing with Columbia flat boxes.

Tall-body mud pump designed for filling from standard 5-gallon drywall compound buckets without tilting. Ideal for high-volume production finishing. Compatible with Columbia gooseneck and box filler attachments.
Standard compound-loading pump for filling automatic tapers (via gooseneck) and all finishing boxes, corner tools, and nail spotters (via box filler). Core tool of any automatic taping system.
Attaches to Columbia mud pump to fill automatic tapers with joint compound. Features integrated foot for stability during filling.
Attaches to Columbia mud pump to fill flat boxes, fat boy boxes, corner tools, and nail spotters with joint compound.
Columbia-branded collaboration with Graco — electric-powered compound pump system. Delivers joint compound at high volume to filling boxes and automatic tapers for maximum production efficiency.
Columbia Tools curated toolset for professional finishers. Includes a comprehensive selection of Columbia taping and finishing tools as a complete package. (Exact contents vary by configuration.)
Mid-to-high level Columbia toolset package with a broad range of finishing and corner tools. Designed for versatile production finishing. (Exact contents vary by configuration.)
Columbia Predator carbon fiber edition toolset. Includes key Predator-line carbon fiber tools combined with standard Columbia tools for a lightweight, high-performance finishing package.
Columbia toolset package targeting production-level professional finishers. Broad tool coverage for complete wall and ceiling finishing workflows. (Exact contents vary by configuration.)
Columbia curated toolset designed for professional finishers needing a streamlined, efficient selection of core tools. (Exact contents vary by configuration.)
Columbia toolset featuring Fat Boy finishing boxes paired with smoothing blades. Designed for finishers who prioritize high-capacity compound delivery and surface smoothing.

Includes: Mud Pump, Box Filler, 10-inch Fat Boy Box, 12-inch Flat Box, Corner Roller, 2.5-inch Standard Flusher, 3-inch Standard Flusher, 42-inch Compound Tube, Inside Corner Applicator, Flat Applicator, One Columbia One Handle, One Box Handle, Angle Head Adaptor.
Entry-level set for those starting with automatic finishing tools. Includes: Mud Pump, Box Filler, 10-inch Fat Boy Box, 12-inch Flat Box, and 42-inch Flat Box Handle.

Includes: Automatic Taper, Mud Pump, Box Filler, Gooseneck, 8-inch Corner Box, Corner Roller, 3-inch Angle Head, 10-inch Fat Boy Box, 12-inch Flat Box, Extendible Box Handle, Two Columbia One Handles, One Columbia One Extendible Handle, and Angle Head Adaptor.

Includes: Mud Pump, Box Filler, 8-inch Corner Box, Corner Roller, 3-inch Angle Head, 10-inch Fat Boy Box, 12-inch Flat Box, Extendible Box Handle, Two Columbia One Handles, One Columbia One Extendible Handle, and Angle Head Adaptor.

Includes: Automatic Taper, Mud Pump, Gooseneck, Box Filler, 10-inch Fat Boy Box, 12-inch Flat Box, 3-inch Angle Head, 3.5-inch Angle Head, 8-inch Corner Box, Corner Roller, 2-inch Nail Spotter, 3-inch Nail Spotter, Two Columbia One Handles, Two Columbia One Extendible Handles, Extendible Box Handle, and Angle Head Adaptor.

Includes: Semi Automatic Taper, 42-inch Compound Tube, 2.5-inch Standard Flusher, 3-inch Standard Flusher, Corner Roller, Inside Corner Applicator, Flat Applicator, External 90-degree Applicator, One Columbia One Handle, One Columbia One Extendible Handle, and Angle Head Adaptor.
